characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Characters you choose from before you start playing the game. Character Class System:The Hero:One of three fighting style classes of the avatars, and the game in general.The Elite:The second class, with a more elegant and quick fighting style.The Berserker:The third and crazier class, with an erratic and powerful fighting style. The Berserker:The third and crazier class, with an erratic and powerful fighting style.

characters.name: Saiyan Avatars
characters.description: Beat (Base, SS,SS2, SS3, SSG, SSB, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Erito (Base, SS,SS2, SS3, SSG, SSB, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Basaku (Base, SS,SS2, SS3, SSG, SSB, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Note (Base,SS,SS2, SS3, SSG, SSB, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Viola (Base, SS,SS2, SS3, SSG, SSB, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking)

characters.name: Majin Avatars
characters.description: Kabra (Base,Class-Up Majin, Super Majin, God Majin, Super God Majin, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Yoshito-Kun (Base, Class-Up Majin, Super Majin, God Majin, Super God Majin, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Salaga (Base, Class-Up Majin, Super Majin, God Majin, Super God Majin, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Berserk Button: Hinted at in their Ultimate Move. Don't "hurt" Mr. Satan in front of any of them. Character Class: Their wardrobes reference these.The Hero dresses in the manner of a Hero a laDragon Quest. His Super God Class-Up makes him into a king instead.The Elite starts out dressing as a Wizard, but his Class-Ups have him instead dressing like more increasingly blinged-out Clerics.The Berserker's outfits are meant to evoke a Dark Knight orEvil Overlord.

characters.name: Frieza Race Avatars
characters.description: Froze (1st Form, 2nd Form, Final Form, Golden Form, Blue-Eye Golden Form, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Rezok (1st Form, 2nd Form, Final Form, Golden Form, Blue-Eye Golden Form, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Freeza Race Berserker (1st Form, 2nd Form, Final Form, Golden Form, Blue-Eye Golden Form, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Anti-Hero: They seem to be this for their race, since everyone else is plain evil. Bizarre Alien Biology: After a few updates, instead of getting new outfits like the other avatars, the Freeza Race gain a new body armor. This is likely a reference to the race's ability to transform their bodies at will.

characters.name: Namekian Avatars
characters.description: Tsumuri (Base, w/ Piccolo, Class-Up Namek, Super Namek, Red-Eye Namek, Blue-Eye Namek, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Seeker (Base, w/ Piccolo, Class-Up Namek, Super Namek, Red-Eye Namek, Blue-Eye Namek, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Kagyu (Base, w/ Piccolo, Class-Up Namek, Super Namek, Red-Eye Namek, Blue-Eye Namek, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Apologetic Attacker: The Namekian Elite, to the point where his victory quote is always a sincere "Sorry! Did that hurt?". Fusion Dance: Their Fusion ability allows them to merge with Piccolo for a power boost that allows them to regenerate ki every turn without being in the support area, doubles the rate that attack increases in proportion to the ki they consume in battle and allows them to quickly charge Hero Energy after winning a clash.

characters.name: Android Avatars
characters.description: Nimu (Base, Class-Up Android, Super Android, God Android, Super God Android, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Nico (Base, Class-Up Android, Super Android, God Android, Super God Android, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Genome (Imperfect, Semi-Perfect, Perfect, God Perfect, Super God Perfect, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Combination Attack: Their Double Attack ability makes them the undisputed masters of these, allowing them to raise the battle power of themselves and their selected partner after executing one. Morphic Resonance:While not related, Nimu bares a striking resemblance to Android 17, and even dons Super 17's outfit in a later update.Nico is basically a gender swapped Android 19, with her skin and clothes having the same coloration.Genome is a purple bio-android in an Imperfect form, as he levels up he looks more like a younger Perfect Cell.

characters.name: Supreme Kai Avatars
characters.description: Zen (Base, Class-Up Kai, Super Kai, God Kai, Unleashed Kai, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Fen (Base, Class-Up Kai, Super Kai, God Kai, Unleashed Kai, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Wairu (Base, Class-Up Kai, Super Kai, God Kai, Unleashed Kai, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Expy: Wairu is a dead ringer forThe Supreme Kai of Time. Golden Super Mode: Their Super God Class form makes them don golden Supreme Kai clothing, and their eyes turn gold as well.

characters.name: Demon Avatars
characters.description: Chamel (Base, Demon God, Super Demon God, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Aurora (Base, Demon God, Super Demon God, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Demon Berserker (Base, Demon God, Super Demon God, UI Omen, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Adaptational Villainy: Chamel in the arcade game, and World Mission is a good guy, if a bit rude and a loner. In the manga he's working for Demigra. Adapted Out: Only Chamel is present in the manga adaptation.

characters.name: God of Destruction Avatars
characters.description: Shandy (God of Destruction, Ultimate God, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Saria (God of Destruction, Ultimate God, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Caser (God of Destruction, Ultimate God, Goku Linking, Frieza Linking, 18 Linking) Destroyer Deity: They're gods of destruction, so this is a given. Expy: Shandy looks like a younger Beerus wearing Champa's clothes.

characters.name: Great Saiyaman  3
characters.description: Open Secret: The game barely hides that he'sTrunks. Not only they share the same voice actor,his first deck is entirely android saga themed, he uses a sword, and when Cooler goes on a rampage in the city, he kills Cooler the same way he killed Frieza. Peninsula of Power Leveling: He is this. Winning his Secret Battle at the Hero Stadium gives you a 3x experience item every time, allowing you to use it every time you fight him. He also gives 200k zeni, and the game really doesn't like giving you much money overall, so you can defeat him, buy better accessories for your deck, and beat him again and again to get your money back. He also will always drop 3 rare tickets which can also give you better cards. Secret Identity: Beneath that mask, the Great Saiyaman 3 is trulyTrunks.

characters.name: The Supreme Kai of Time
characters.description: The Supreme Kai in charge of time. She has the same role and backstory as herXenoversecounterpart, but she has her own spin. Adaptational Badass: She is more willing to join in the fights, and has her own unique transformation similar to Fused Zamasu's halo called "Time Power Unleashed". Almighty Janitor: Possibly an unintentional case. Her position as a god isn't low, but since she's a time patroller, she's keeping watching of entire multiverses contained in each timeline. The entire conflict around the Super Space-Time saga is about Aeos thinking there are too many timelines and that they should be destroyed, since there shouldn't be too many, and this isn't treated as Aeos doing something a Supreme Kai of Time shouldn't be doing, and Chronoa refuses to erase timelines out of morality. In other words, Chronoa has the authority of erasing multiple timelines, which includes erasing Kaios, Supreme Kais, Gods of Destruction, Angels orZeno himself, all the while she's treated like she isn't that high on the food chain. Depending on the Artist: Her cup size in herTime Power Unleashedtransformation is this. Her 3D model in the games themselves have them bigger but it's not too noticeable, while insome cards they aren't much bigger, and in othersthey're noticeably larger, something her Dokkan Unit kept. InSDBH'smanga version they're larger than her head. Dual Age Modes: Chronoa'sSuper ModeTime Power Unleashed ages her up to an adult appearance.

characters.name: The Xeno Z-Fighters
characters.description: At first, Chronoa summoned Future Trunks to the Time Nest due to himbreaking the rules of time, she makes him join the Time Patrol to stop the Dark Empire. After saving Bardock from the control of Towa, Trunks summons Goku, Vegeta, Gohan and Goten to join the Time Patrol. Later during the fight against Mechikabura, GT's Pan gets unwillingly drafted into the Time Patrol. Adaptational Badass: All of them receive special transformations.Vegeta and Future Trunks gets the Super Saiyan 3 transformation. Remarkable on Trunks, as hisXenoversecounterpart didn't get the honor. Vegeta is also capable of transforming into Super Saiyan 4 at will with no need for Blutz Waves machines.Gohan receives the Super Saiyan 4 transformation.Goten receives the Ultimate state that Gohan obtained with Old Kai.Trunks receives Super Saiyan God thanks to the Time Patrollers performing the ritual.In the game, Xeno Goku lost his first fight withDBSGoku, vaguely declaringDBSGoku is one step above him. In anime and manga, the fight was a draw. Vegeta and Future Trunks gets the Super Saiyan 3 transformation. Remarkable on Trunks, as hisXenoversecounterpart didn't get the honor. Vegeta is also capable of transforming into Super Saiyan 4 at will with no need for Blutz Waves machines. Gohan receives the Super Saiyan 4 transformation.
